meta.title: Allergy Practice Software | Immunotherapy Management & Testing Coordination | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to allergy practice operations. Immunotherapy vial tracking. Injection scheduling. Allergy testing coordination. Biologic authorization for severe asthma.

hero.subhead: Your immunotherapy program needs systematic management. Your injection scheduling needs coordination. Your allergy testing needs tracking. clinIQ manages immunotherapy programs, schedules injections, and coordinates allergy care.

sections.content:
Allergy practices run complex immunotherapy programs while coordinating testing and managing severe disease patients on biologics.

**The immunotherapy management burden:**

Hundreds of patients on immunotherapy. Each with custom vials. Escalation protocols. Expiration dates. Reaction monitoring. Without systems, management is overwhelming.

**The injection scheduling complexity:**

Weekly injections during build-up. Monthly during maintenance. Different patients on different schedules. Missed injections require protocol restarts.

Immunotherapy programs require systematic tracking:

**Vial management:**

• Patient-specific vials
• Mixing dates and expiration
• Concentration tracking
• Remix scheduling

**What clinIQ does:**

Vial inventory: Every patient's vials tracked with mixing date and expiration.

Remix alerts: Vial expiring in 2 weeks → alert to remix.

Concentration tracking: Current concentration, escalation protocol position.

Reaction documentation: Post-injection monitoring documented.

**What clinIQ does:**

Injection schedule: Every patient's injection schedule visible.

Missed injection tracking: Patient missed injection → protocol implications flagged.

Appointment reminders: Automated reminders for upcoming injections.

Wait time compliance: 30-minute post-injection wait tracked and documented.

Skin prick testing, intradermal testing, patch testing — each requires scheduling, supplies, and result documentation.

**What clinIQ does:**

Testing scheduling: Room and supply coordination.

Result documentation: Standardized result entry.

Interpretation: Results inform immunotherapy formulation.

Severe asthma biologics (Xolair, Nucala, Fasenra, Dupixent, Tezspire) require authorization.

**What clinIQ does:**

Auth tracking: Status per patient per drug.

Step therapy documentation: Prior treatment failures documented.

Injection scheduling: In-office biologic injections coordinated.

**Week 1-2:** Immunotherapy program, injection scheduling, testing workflow configured.

**ROI:** Immunotherapy compliance improves. Vial waste decreases. Testing efficiency gains.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.q: How do you track immunotherapy vials?
faqs.a: Every patient's vials tracked with mixing date, expiration, and concentration. Remix alerts prevent expiration.
Patient injection schedules visible. Missed injections flagged with protocol implications.

testimonial.quote: We eliminated vial expiration waste and improved injection compliance. The system pays for itself.
